definitions: v. 楔入；嵌入（在此语境下指被紧紧卡在泥沙中）

examples.text: Yet some of Cape Canaveral’s most legendary attractions lie unseen, wedged under the sea’s surface in mud and sand, for this part of the world has a reputation as a deadly ship trap.
attractions lie unseen, wedged under the sea's surface in mud and sand,
examples.explanation: 这些景点隐匿不见，被楔入海底表面的泥沙之中。
